text.title: Methodology Versioning and CHANGELOG Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the diff include any breaking change (schema rename/remove, rule-id rename/remove)?

branch.question: Was a migration plan generated covering every breaking item?
Are there additive changes (new rule, new content file, new schema field)?

text.example: Concrete walk: Diff adds rule `no-sole-approver-agent` and a new property to schema; no removals or renames → MINOR, CHANGELOG entry under Unreleased; no migration plan needed.
